4323676.title: History of Consciousness

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Department at the University of California, Santa Cruz

4323676.description: Department at the University of California, Santa Cruz
4323676.extract: History of Consciousness is the name of a department in the Humanities Division of the University of California, Santa Cruz with a 50+ year history of interdisciplinary research and student training in "established and emergent disciplines and fields" in the humanities, arts, sciences, and social sciences based on a diverse array of theoretical approaches. The program has a history of well-known affiliated faculty and of well-known program graduates.
